name: opys
description: Operate the opys file-based feature inventory and work items. Requires the `opys` CLI (cargo install opys).

interface.longDescription: Track what a project does (features) and its in-flight changes (work items) as version-controlled markdown, operated through the opys CLI and verified in CI.
defaultPrompt: Start a work item for FEAT-0001.
Run opys verify and fix any problems.
